properties.description: Alerts on successful logins outside business hours (8am-8pm AEST, UTC+10). Covers AU, IN and PE team members.
properties.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event'
| where event_type_s == 'login_attempt'
| where success_b == true
| extend HourUTC = hourofday(TimeGenerated)
| extend HourAEST = (HourUTC + 10) % 24
| where HourAEST < 6 or HourAEST >= 22
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    User = initiated_by_username_s,
    Device = system_displayName_s,
    HourAEST,
    Country = geoip_country_code_s,
    IP = client_ip_s
